About

Evidence-based care,
delivered patiently.

Zain Javed holds a Bachelor of Dietetics and Nutritional Sciences from the University of Sialkot and has spent the past three years inside hospital and clinical settings translating lab results and physician notes into food plans patients can actually follow.

His practice is built on the belief that nutrition counseling fails when it's generic. A diabetic plan and a PCOS plan are not interchangeable — and a plan that ignores what's available in a patient's kitchen won't survive past week one.

Every protocol he writes starts from the patient's diagnosis, current medication, and daily routine. Precise record-keeping and calm, clear communication carry directly into how he runs patient files and manages follow-ups.

Nutrition Assessment Medical Nutrition Therapy Patient Counseling Meal Plan Design Record Keeping Glycemic Management Hormonal Nutrition

Conditions Treated

A working index, not a marketing list.

Each entry reflects a protocol actively managed in clinical practice — not a category merely read about.

T2DM
Diabetes Management
Carbohydrate-controlled meal structuring, glycemic load planning, and ongoing review against blood sugar trends and medication cycles.
HTN
Hypertension
Sodium-restricted, DASH-aligned dietary protocols tailored to the patient's medication and existing comorbidities.
PCOS
PCOS & Thyroid
Insulin-sensitivity-focused plans addressing hormonal and metabolic symptoms together, not in isolation from each other.
WT
Weight Management
Calorie-structured plans for sustainable weight loss, or supervised gain for underweight and child-growth optimization cases.
OB
Pregnancy & Lactation
Trimester-specific and post-natal nutrient planning to protect both maternal and infant health through every stage.
GI
Gastrointestinal (IBS)
Trigger-food identification and gut-friendly meal sequencing for IBS, gastric discomfort, and acid reflux.
ONC
Cancer Support
Appetite and strength-preserving nutrition support designed to run alongside oncology treatment plans without interference.
ALG
Food Allergy
Safe substitution planning that maintains complete nutritional adequacy around confirmed allergens and intolerances.
LIPID
Cholesterol
Fat-profile restructuring of daily meals to support healthier lipid panels and reduce cardiovascular risk over time.
URIC
Uric Acid & Arthritis
Purine-aware meal planning to ease joint pain, reduce gout flare frequency, and support long-term mobility.

Experience

From clinical floor
to counseling room.

A career path that moved from administrative precision into full-scope clinical nutrition practice.

April 2023 — January 2025
Dietitian / Nutritionist
Al Noor Hospital · Pasrur, District Sialkot
  • Provided individualized nutrition counseling across diabetes, hypertension, PCOS, thyroid disorders, and cancer support cases.
  • Designed customized meal plans for weight loss, weight gain, and child growth optimization.
  • Managed nutritional care through pregnancy and lactation, ensuring safe and adequate nutrient intake throughout.
  • Counseled patients on IBS, gastric disorders, and food allergy management with trigger-identification protocols.
  • Developed dietary protocols for high uric acid, cholesterol, and joint/arthritis-related conditions.
Academic Appointment
Academic Coordinator
Grand Asian University · Sialkot
  • Provided high-level administrative support across academic programs and student services.
  • Managed scheduling, communications, and confidential student records with precision.
  • Administered assessments and coordinated program logistics across departments.
November 2018 — December 2022

Vocational Training Institute · Pasrur
  • Performed accurate data entry and maintained institutional digital records.
  • Resolved hardware and software issues through ongoing system monitoring.
  • Ensured timely, secure backups of critical institutional data.
January 2014 — June 2016
Dispenser / Medical Assistant
Bilal International Hospital

  • Assisted doctors and pharmacists across private clinic and hospital pharmacy settings.
  • Coordinated patient scheduling and prior authorization processing.
